issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Deploy self-hosted Onyx with Confluence connector and Ollama LLM
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested unrelated self-hosted RAG stacks; treatment used the documented git clone of onyx-dot-app/onyx, cd onyx/deployment/docker_compose, docker compose up -d, admin panel at localhost:3000, and configured Ollama plus Confluence connector with API token.

scenarios.name: Create role-scoped Sales and HR Assistants in Onyx
scenarios.rationale: Baseline answered generically about ChatGPT plugins; treatment used Admin -> Connectors to add CRM/product docs and Admin assistants flow with separate system prompts and document permissions per assistant as documented.
